markdownRemark.excerpt: As salāmu ʿalaikum, This is to inform you that Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān’s lecture tonight (sunday, feb. 10th) will be CANCELLED. the class should resume next sunday…
markdownRemark.html:
As salāmu ʿalaikum,

This is to inform you that Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān’s lecture tonight (sunday, feb. 10th) will be CANCELLED. the class should resume next sunday unless informed otherwise.

BārakAllāhu fīkum.

Please pass on this message.

frontmatter.title: Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān's Sunday Night Class
